expression: Top''/Bottom Board: {([Width]) - 2 * ([BoardThick])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Side Board: {([Height])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Back Board: {([Width])} x {([Height])} x {([BackBoardThick])} x 1pcs
author: sheenhoong

remarks.zh: 计算橱柜板材尺寸。[Width], [Height], [Depth] 是总测量值，[BoardThick] 是顶板、底板和侧板的材料厚度，[BackBoardThick] 是背景板的材料厚度。(AI translated, please check)
remarks.en: Calculates board sizes for a cabinet. [Width], [Height],[Depth] is total Measurement, [BoardThick] is Top, Bottom and Side Board material thickness, [BackBoardThick] is Background Board material thickness.
remarks.ms: Mengira saiz papan untuk kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] ialah ukuran keseluruhan, [BoardThick] ialah ketebalan bahan Papan Atas, Bawah dan Sisi, [BackBoardThick] ialah ketebalan bahan papan belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.id: Menghitung ukuran papan untuk lemari. [Width], [Height], [Depth] adalah ukuran total, [BoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan atas, bawah, dan samping, [BackBoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan papan latar belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.th: คำนวณขนาดกระดานสำหรับตู้ [Width], [Height], [Depth] คือการวัดทั้งหมด [BoardThick] คือความหนาของวัสดุบอร์ดด้านบน ด้านล่าง และด้านข้าง [BackBoardThick] คือความหนาของวัสดุบอร์ดด้านหลัง (AI translated, please check)
remarks.vi: Tính toán kích thước bảng cho một tủ. [Width], [Height], [Depth] là tổng kích thước, [BoardThick] là độ dày vật liệu của bảng trên, dưới và bên cạnh, [BackBoardThick] là độ dày vật liệu của bảng nền. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.tl: Kinakalkula ang mga sukat ng kahoy para sa kabinet. [Width], [Height], [Depth] ay kabuuang sukat, [BoardThick] ay kapal ng materyal ng Nangungunang, Ibaba at Gilid na Board, [BackBoardThick] ay kapal ng materyal ng Background Board. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.my: အလှဆင်တဲ့ဗီရို သင်္ချာတွက်ချက်မှုမျာ။ [Width], [Height],[Depth] ကိုစုစုပေါင်းတိုင်းတာမှုဟုဆိုလိုသည် [BoardThick] ညွှန်ဆိုချက်မျာတွင် ထိပ်, အောက်, ဘေးချောင့်မတည်ဖြစ်သည်။၏အထူနှင့်[BackBoardThick] အနောက်ဘက်သို့ စိမ်းနေသောခြံရဲဖြစ်သည် (AI translated, please check)
remarks.km: គណនាអណ្តែតសម្រាប់ទូ។[ទទឹង], [កំពស់], [ជម្រៅ] គឺជាខ្នាតសរុប, [BoardThick] គឺជាប្រេកកម្មវប្បកម្ម。[BackBoardThick] គឺជាទំហំសរុបនៃវត្ថុវិស្សភាព។
remarks.lo: ຄິດໄດ້ດວຍຕູ້, ພາບດ້ານໄມ້ [ параметры!<!>>>>fmis-runtime try params!f-json eta-processing-end multnance}/too
